articles.title: Reset password
articles.body: Users can reset their password from the login page using the Forgot password link. A reset email arrives within 5 minutes.

articles.title: Refund policy
articles.body: Full refunds are available within 14 days of purchase if the product is unused. Contact support with order ID.

articles.title: Shipping times
articles.body: Standard shipping is 5–7 business days. Express is 2–3 days. International may take 10–15 days.
